title: Le signorine dello 04
writer: Sergio Amidei, Agenore Incrocci, Furio Scarpelli
actors: Giovanna Ralli, Antonella Lualdi, Franca Valeri
plot: The lives and loves of five Italian telephone operators. One is betrayed by her husband, one helps a student who wants to take his life, one changes her boyfriend every other day, one is a single mother and the last one tries to i...
